comment: Flow_ChaserSend (phase-2 M2.F / ADR-0003). The SEPARATE outbound-send flow behind the kill switch; chaser-draft stays draft-only and untouched. Reads a DRAFTED Chaser, HARD-SKIPS channel=whatsapp (WhatsApp Business is not automatable - draft + manual send only, ADR-0003 invariant), reads the CHASER_SEND_ENABLED Dataverse gate (READ, never DEFINE), and ONLY when the gate is true sends via the Office 365 Outlook 'Send an email (V2)' action on the ALREADY-BOUND cr1bd_sharedmailbox_office365 (digital@) connection, then flips the Chaser drafted->sent + stamps sentBy/sentAt + writes a chaser_sent AuditEvent. The recipient comes from the Chaser's targetName (a real garage/provider address) or a trigger input - NEVER a hardcoded literal. [BUILD]. ACTIVATION [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: sending real email crosses the live boundary - flip CHASER_SEND_ENABLED=true + turn this flow ON only when the operator is ready; Claude never enables the kill switch. The chaser_sent audit action (100000019) must be added additively to cr1bd_auditaction first (see dataverse/.build setup script).

manual.comment: Invoked with a drafted Chaser id (e.g. by a scheduled sweep or staff action). The flow re-reads the Chaser to honour the latest channel/status, never trusting stale trigger data.

Set_gate_CHASER_SEND_ENABLED.comment: Default false = the outbound kill switch is OFF. The send action runs ONLY when this is true (flipped by the operator, [RESERVED-FOR-USER]).

Set_is_sendable_email.comment: Only an EMAIL-channel (100000000) chaser still in DRAFTED status (100000000) is auto-sendable. channel=whatsapp (100000001) is HARD-SKIPPED here - it can never be auto-sent (ADR-0003).

If_send_allowed.comment: Both must hold: the kill switch is on AND this is a drafted email chaser. A whatsapp chaser or a gate-off run falls to the else (audited no-op, stays drafted for manual send).

Send_chaser_email.comment: Office 365 Outlook 'Send an email (V2)' on the already-bound digital@ shared mailbox connection. To = the Chaser targetName (a real garage/provider recipient) - never a hardcoded literal. [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: real email leaves the tenant only when CHASER_SEND_ENABLED is true and this flow is ON.

parameters.emailMessage/Body: @{coalesce(outputs('Get_chaser')?['body/cr1bd_name'], 'We still need some outstanding items to proceed with your case.')}

Mark_chaser_sent.comment: Flip drafted(100000000)->sent(100000001) + stamp sentBy/sentAt AFTER a successful send (runAfter Send_chaser_email Succeeded), so a send failure leaves the Chaser drafted for retry.

Audit_chaser_sent.comment: chaser_sent audit action 100000019 - additively extends cr1bd_auditaction (next free value after inspection_override=100000018); created by the dataverse/.build setup script before this flow is activated.

parameters.item/cr1bd_after: @if(variables('gate_CHASER_SEND_ENABLED'), 'skipped: chaser is whatsapp-channel or not drafted (manual send only)', 'skipped: CHASER_SEND_ENABLED=false (outbound kill switch off)')

Audit_chaser_send_skipped.comment: No-op path: gate off OR a whatsapp/non-drafted chaser. The Chaser is NOT modified - it stays drafted for manual send (whatsapp) or a later run (gate flip).
